title: AP Mobilization Advance — Restored Provision (Post 27-Nov-2024)
text_english: Contractors for works exceeding more than Rs.{{ma_threshold}} (default Rs.1,00,00,000 i.e. Rs.1.00 Crore) of estimated contract value are PERMITTED to AVAIL the facility of MOBILIZATION ADVANCE up to {{ma_pct}}% (default 10%) of the value of the contract against an UNCONDITIONAL AND IRREVOCABLE BANK GUARANTEE, with the following conditions: (i) the BANK GUARANTEE shall be VALID till the recovery of the entire Mobilization Advance from the contractor/agency; (ii) a TIME FRAME for ENCASHING the BG SHALL be put if the contractor/agency does not initiate the work without valid reasons; (iii) a SPECIFIC RATE OF INTEREST shall be charged on the pending MA — at the PREVAILING RATE OF ONE-YEAR MCLR of STATE BANK OF INDIA (currently {{mclr_rate_pct}}% (default 9%) w.e.f. 15 November 2024). The advance and interest SHALL BE RECOVERED from the contractor's bills in suitable instalments. (Source: GO Ms No 57, Water Resources (Reforms) Department dated 27-11-2024 — restoring the Mobilization Advance Provision cancelled by GO Ms No 83 of 2019.)
